meaning: adj.[鍔╙妫嬬洏鏍肩殑,闀跺祵鐨勮姳鏍风殑
examples: On the source data level, the vertices are assembled and tessellated.
In computer drawing, generally, curves are represented by line segments and surfaces are tessellated up with small plane patches.
A tessellated green wall was installed in the lobby, and generous planters were added to several floors. Balconies provide connections to the outdoors.
